_about: ONE addressable source for the tool-layer values that MUST agree across languages. Read by JS (sim/stream.js, onboard-checks.js), GDScript (smoke_binding.gd) and Bash (twin_ship.sh, verify_twin.sh via lib/checks.sh contract_get). Do NOT re-hardcode any of these in a tool; read them here. Keys are flat scalars so a dependency-free bash grep can parse the file without jq. The *_version keys pin the dev toolchain: committed .gd source is formatted with the pinned gdtoolkit, and the gates are exercised against the pinned Godot minor — onboard-check warns on the exact mismatch (ledger D9-toolchain-drift).
